comment: Perfect location 5 minutes from where we needed to be. Clean quiet great host. Ideal for visiting family in Jacksonville. Will book again for December.
Incredible property with actual views of the battlefield. Robert had great local history recommendations. Perfect for a history teacher making this trip.
Wonderful host lovely room. Walking distance to the Battle Green. We arrived late and Dorothy had left snacks. Highly recommend for a day trip to Lexington.
Good value comfortable bed friendly host. Easy access to visit family nearby. Quiet neighborhood. A solid pick if you are in Jacksonville.
Great spot for a Gettysburg trip. Eleanor gave us a local guide to the best sites. Could not ask for more. Will definitely return.
Nice house good space for two people. Colonial Williamsburg is a short drive. Thomas was communicative and helpful. Would recommend for history buffs.
Comfortable home in Philly close to the Constitution Center. George was responsive. Good value for a quick history trip.
Beautiful South End apartment. Stylish well-equipped kitchen. Michael was a wonderful host. Perfect for a city stay without the hotel price.
Charming room in Concord very close to the Old North Bridge. Great for a day trip from Boston. Martha was incredibly welcoming.
Comfortable and well-located in Jacksonville. Clean good AC quiet neighborhood. Patricia was helpful and responsive.
Loved the pool Beverly was an amazing host. The neighborhood felt safe and local. Would book again for the December trip.
A beautiful old colonial home. We felt completely at home. The town of Lexington itself is wonderful.
Rustic cabin feel in a great location for battlefield access. Very peaceful good for unwinding after a long day of touring Gettysburg.
Great find near the Red Line. Sarah was a helpful host location was very convenient for getting around Boston. Quiet and clean.
Clean modern studio in a good part of Jacksonville. Good value easy self-check-in comfortable bed. Would stay again for family visits.
Convenient studio good wifi nice kitchen. Colonial Williamsburg is very walkable. Nancy was straightforward and easy to communicate with.
A beautiful Victorian in JP. Linda was an excellent host. Spacious comfortable. Felt like a real Boston neighborhood experience.
Good spot close to the area we needed. Carol was easy to deal with and the place was clean. Works well for a family visit trip to Jacksonville.
Clean DC studio with easy Metro access. Steven was quick to respond. Good price for the location. Fine for a quick Washington trip.
Simple comfortable room in a quiet Jacksonville neighborhood. Good value. Ronald was a warm host. Easy parking.
